name: Chicken Ginger Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the artichoke hearts and baby corn, then let them sit in water for about 1 hour.
2. Drain and quarter the artichoke hearts; cut the baby corn cobs into smaller pieces. Set aside.
3. Peel the ginger and julienne it into matchstick-size pieces. Toss with a little sesame oil and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the dried cooked chicken, artichoke hearts, baby corn, ginger, mayonnaise (to taste), soy sauce, salt, and pepper.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Add a squeeze of lemon juice and garnish with fresh basil.
6. Serve over a platter of lettuce and place tomatoes around the edges. Accompany with French bread or warm bread of your choice and cheese. A nice fruit cup would be good with this.
